compiled_state.title: Implement ticket_tag + ticket_untag in library and wire dispatcher
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## Testing Mode
RED

## What to Implement
Add ticket_tag and ticket_untag to plugins/dso/scripts/ticket-lib-api.sh and wire ticket dispatcher tag/untag cases.

## Scope (symmetric pair — bundled to avoid dead-code intermediate state)
ticket_tag <ticket_id> <tag>:
- Parse args; validate ticket_id and tag non-empty
- If DSO_TICKET_LEGACY=1: exec bash $SCRIPT_DIR/ticket-tag.sh "$@"; return $?
- Pure bash: write TAG event via write_commit_event (no python3 calls)
- Use return (not exit) for all error paths

ticket_untag <ticket_id> <tag>:
- Parse args; validate ticket_id and tag non-empty
- If DSO_TICKET_LEGACY=1: exec bash $SCRIPT_DIR/ticket-untag.sh "$@"; return $?
- Pure bash: write UNTAG event via write_commit_event
- Use return (not exit) for all error paths

Dispatcher changes: replace exec bash .../ticket-tag.sh and exec bash .../ticket-untag.sh with _ticketlib_dispatch calls (source library lazily if not already sourced).

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] ticket_tag and ticket_untag defined in ticket-lib-api.sh
  Verify: grep -q "^ticket_tag" $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/scripts/ticket-lib-api.sh && grep -q "^ticket_untag" $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/scripts/ticket-lib-api.sh
- [ ] DSO_TICKET_LEGACY=1 routes to original .sh scripts
  Verify: DSO_TICKET_LEGACY=1 bash $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/scripts/test-ticket-lib-api.sh 2>&1 | grep -q "PASS\|legacy"
- [ ] Both functions use return not exit
  Verify: ! grep -P "(?<!\\))\bexit\b" $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/scripts/ticket-lib-api.sh | grep -E "ticket_tag|ticket_untag"
- [ ] test_ticket_tag_via_library and test_ticket_untag_via_library pass
  Verify: bash $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/scripts/test-ticket-lib-api.sh 2>&1 | grep -E "PASS.*(tag|untag)"
- [ ] bash tests/run-all.sh passes
  Verify: bash $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/run-all.sh
